metadata.story_summary: User resets password using a one-time password (OTP) sent to their phone.

user_story: "As a user I want to reset my password via OTP on phone."

test_cases.title: Successful password reset with valid OTP
test_cases.description: Verify that a user can reset their password by entering a valid OTP sent to their registered phone number.
preconditions: User has a registered phone number linked to their account
User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User enters their registered phone number and requests OTP
steps.expected_result: System sends a valid OTP to the user's phone

steps.action: User enters the received OTP and a new valid password
steps.expected_result: System validates OTP and accepts the new password

steps.action: User submits the password reset form
steps.expected_result: System confirms password reset success and allows user to log in with new password

test_cases.expected_outcome: User successfully resets password using the OTP sent to their phone.

test_cases.title: Password reset with OTP resend functionality
test_cases.description: Verify that the user can request a resend of the OTP if they did not receive it initially.
preconditions: User has a registered phone number linked to their account
User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User requests OTP for password reset
steps.expected_result: System sends OTP to user's phone

steps.action: User does not receive OTP and clicks 'Resend OTP'
steps.expected_result: System sends a new OTP to the user's phone

steps.action: User enters the newly received OTP and new password
steps.expected_result: System validates OTP and accepts the new password

test_cases.expected_outcome: User can successfully reset password after resending OTP.

test_cases.title: Password reset with OTP on different phone number linked to account
test_cases.description: Verify that the password reset process works when the user has multiple phone numbers linked and selects the correct one.
preconditions: User has multiple phone numbers linked to their account
User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User selects one of their registered phone numbers and requests OTP
steps.expected_result: System sends OTP to the selected phone number

steps.action: User enters the received OTP and new password
steps.expected_result: System validates OTP and accepts the new password

steps.action: User submits the password reset form

test_cases.expected_outcome: User successfully resets password using OTP sent to the selected phone number.

test_cases.title: Password reset request with empty phone number input
test_cases.description: Verify system behavior when user submits password reset request without entering a phone number.
preconditions: User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User submits password reset form with empty phone number field
steps.expected_result: System displays validation error indicating phone number is required

test_cases.expected_outcome: Password reset request is rejected with appropriate error message for empty phone number.

test_cases.title: Password reset request with invalid phone number format
test_cases.description: Verify system rejects phone numbers that do not conform to expected format.
preconditions: User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User enters invalid phone number format (e.g., letters or special characters) and submits request
steps.expected_result: System displays validation error indicating invalid phone number format

test_cases.expected_outcome: Password reset request is rejected due to invalid phone number format.

test_cases.title: Password reset with expired OTP
test_cases.description: Verify that the system rejects OTPs that have expired.

steps.action: User enters expired OTP and new password
steps.expected_result: System rejects OTP and displays expiration error

test_cases.expected_outcome: Password reset fails due to expired OTP with appropriate error message.

test_cases.title: Password reset with maximum length phone number input
test_cases.description: Verify system behavior when user enters phone number at maximum allowed length.
preconditions: User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User enters phone number with maximum allowed digits and submits request
steps.expected_result: System accepts phone number and sends OTP if number is valid

test_cases.expected_outcome: Password reset request processes successfully with maximum length phone number.

test_cases.title: Concurrent OTP requests for password reset
test_cases.description: Verify system handles multiple OTP requests in quick succession gracefully.
preconditions: User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User requests OTP multiple times rapidly
steps.expected_result: System sends OTPs according to rate limiting policy or queues requests

test_cases.expected_outcome: System enforces rate limits or queues OTP requests to prevent abuse.

test_cases.title: SQL injection attempt in phone number field
test_cases.description: Verify system sanitizes phone number input to prevent SQL injection attacks.
preconditions: User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User enters SQL injection payload in phone number field and submits request
steps.expected_result: System rejects input and does not execute malicious SQL commands

test_cases.expected_outcome: System is secure against SQL injection via phone number input.

test_cases.title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) attempt in phone number field
test_cases.description: Verify system prevents XSS attacks by sanitizing phone number input.
preconditions: User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User enters script tags or XSS payload in phone number field and submits request
steps.expected_result: System sanitizes input and does not execute scripts

test_cases.expected_outcome: System is secure against XSS attacks via phone number input.

test_cases.title: CSRF protection on password reset form
test_cases.description: Verify that the password reset form is protected against Cross-Site Request Forgery attacks.
preconditions: User is on the password reset page

steps.action: Submit password reset form without valid CSRF token
steps.expected_result: System rejects the request and displays an error or redirects

test_cases.expected_outcome: Password reset form is protected against CSRF attacks.

test_cases.title: Privilege escalation attempt via OTP reuse
test_cases.description: Verify system prevents reuse of OTPs to avoid privilege escalation or unauthorized password resets.
preconditions: User has successfully reset password using an OTP

steps.action: User attempts to reuse the same OTP to reset password again
steps.expected_result: System rejects OTP reuse and denies password reset

test_cases.expected_outcome: System prevents OTP reuse to avoid privilege escalation.

test_cases.title: Oversized payload in phone number field
test_cases.description: Verify system handles excessively long input in phone number field without crashing or exposing vulnerabilities.
preconditions: User is on the password reset page

steps.action: User enters an excessively long string in phone number field and submits request
steps.expected_result: System rejects input with validation error or truncates input safely

test_cases.expected_outcome: System handles oversized payloads securely and gracefully.
